name: PATENT_COUNT_BY_ASSIGNEE_AND_TARGETPAIR
description: Count patents for one assignee and one target pair.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name}) RETURN a.name AS assignee, tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
